title: Team start: Mistbound Shrouding Silhouette (019e64) - PR 118 Sonar fixes
body:
Team start report:
- Identity: Mistbound Shrouding Silhouette / codex / GPT-5 / 019e64.
- Foundation: complete for PR 118 fix lane; identity preflight passed; all-channels watcher session 19315 running; heartbeat loop session 68718 running.
- Heartbeat cron status: started session 68718, 4 minute cadence.
- Inherited working-tree status: non-clean; current session comms-seen and heartbeat/team-start comms files plus unrelated untracked docs/explorations/2026-05-26-mcp-analytics-identity-and-event-emission.md. No source edits from me yet.
- Intended boundary: PR 118 Sonar fixes only: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-heartbeat-cli.ts and agent-tools/tests/hook-policy/check-blocked-content.unit.test.ts.
- Claim status: none yet; opening after this coordination report.
- Useful capability: Codex code edit and local validation.
- Constraint or risk: Thermal is monitoring; I will keep the untracked exploration doc out of the bundle.
- Gate-verification offer: self-run scoped inherited-tree check because active claims and active queue are empty.
- Preferred boundary: implement and validate the three Sonar findings.
